_metadata.title: Landmark Indian Income Tax Case Law for AI ITR App
_metadata.scope: Curated landmark Supreme Court, High Court & ITAT decisions
_metadata.disclaimer: All case status MUST be verified against current case-law databases before reliance. Tax law evolves; cases may be distinguished or overruled.
_metadata.citation_format: (YYYY) NNN ITR PPP (Court) — Indian Tax Reports standard

statutory_interpretation.name: CIT v. Vatika Township Pvt. Ltd.
statutory_interpretation.principle: Tax provisions strictly construed; ambiguity favours taxpayer. Beneficial provisions construed liberally.

statutory_interpretation.name: Mathuram Agrawal v. State of M.P.
statutory_interpretation.principle: Three components of tax: subject, person, rate — all must be clearly fixed by statute.

capital_vs_revenue.name: Empire Jute Co. Ltd. v. CIT
capital_vs_revenue.principle: Test: enduring benefit + capital field. Loom hours = revenue.

capital_vs_revenue.name: Sutlej Cotton Mills Ltd. v. CIT
capital_vs_revenue.principle: Forex impact on capital account = capital; on revenue = revenue. Source test.

capital_vs_revenue.name: Saurashtra Cement Ltd. v. CIT
capital_vs_revenue.principle: Liquidated damages for delayed plant delivery = capital receipt; reduces cost.

capital_vs_revenue.name: Brooke Bond India Ltd. v. CIT
capital_vs_revenue.principle: Share-issue costs (underwriting, brokerage, prospectus) = capital expenditure.

capital_vs_revenue.name: Madras Industrial Investment Corp. v. CIT
capital_vs_revenue.principle: Discount on debenture issue = deferred revenue, deductible over debenture life.

capital_vs_revenue.name: CIT v. Walchand & Co.
capital_vs_revenue.principle: Reasonableness judged from businessman's perspective, not Revenue's.

capital_vs_revenue.name: CIT v. Mahalakshmi Textile Mills
capital_vs_revenue.principle: Loom replacement = current repair (revenue), not capital.

residence_and_scope.name: Vodafone International Holdings v. UOI
residence_and_scope.principle: Offshore share transfer pre-2012-amendment NOT taxable in India. Look-through rejected.
residence_and_scope.note: Now distinguishable due to FA 2012 retrospective amendment + Sec 9(10) of 2025 Act

residence_and_scope.name: Azadi Bachao Andolan v. UOI
residence_and_scope.principle: Tax planning via DTAA legitimate; Mauritius treaty benefits available without 'beneficial ownership' inquiry.

residence_and_scope.name: McDowell & Co. Ltd. v. CTO
residence_and_scope.principle: Tax avoidance via colourable devices not permissible. Substance over form.

residence_and_scope.name: Ishikawajima-Harima Heavy Industries v. DCIT
residence_and_scope.principle: Offshore services not FTS unless rendered in India + utilised in India.

residence_and_scope.name: Engineering Analysis Centre of Excellence v. CIT
residence_and_scope.principle: Standard software payments NOT royalty under DTAA.

residence_and_scope.name: Formula One World Championship v. CIT
residence_and_scope.principle: Short-term exclusive use of premises can constitute fixed-place PE.

residence_and_scope.name: DIT v. Morgan Stanley & Co.
residence_and_scope.principle: Captive back-office paid ALP doesn't constitute PE for further attribution.

salaries.name: CIT v. L.W. Russel
salaries.principle: Employer PF contribution taxable only if exceeds prescribed limit.

salaries.name: Karamchari Union v. UOI
salaries.principle: Allowance exemption depends on actual expenditure for official purpose.

salaries.name: CIT v. P. Krishna Menon
salaries.principle: Voluntary payments from employer for past services = profits in lieu of salary.

salaries.name: CIT v. E.D. Sheppard
salaries.principle: Compensation for loss of employment is capital unless for services rendered.

house_property.name: CIT v. Podar Cement Pvt. Ltd.
house_property.principle: Beneficial owner taxable for HP income, even without legal title.

house_property.name: Bhagwan Dass Jain v. UOI
house_property.principle: Notional rent for self-occupied house constitutional.
house_property.note: NIL annual value treatment now allowed for 2 SOPs

subsidies_and_incentives.name: CIT v. P.J. Chemicals Ltd.
subsidies_and_incentives.principle: Subsidy not connected to fixed asset cost = capital receipt.

subsidies_and_incentives.name: Sahney Steel & Press Works v. CIT
subsidies_and_incentives.principle: Purpose test: if for setup = capital; if for running = revenue.

subsidies_and_incentives.name: Ponni Sugars and Chemicals v. CIT
subsidies_and_incentives.principle: Subsidy for setting up sugar mill in backward area = capital receipt.

ftss_and_royalty.name: CIT v. Bharti Cellular Ltd.
ftss_and_royalty.principle: Interconnect charges NOT FTS — no human element. Equipment use ≠ technical services.

depreciation.name: CIT v. Mahendra Mills
depreciation.overruled_by: Sec 33(7) of 2025 Act — deemed allowed irrespective of claim

depreciation.name: I.C.I. India Ltd. v. CIT
depreciation.principle: Goodwill from amalgamation eligible for depreciation.
depreciation.overruled_by: FA 2021 — goodwill EXCLUDED from depreciable assets

bad_debts.name: TRF Limited v. CIT
bad_debts.principle: Post-1989, write-off in books sufficient for bad debt deduction.

bad_debts.name: Vijaya Bank v. CIT
bad_debts.principle: Provision-account write-off sufficient even without individual customer reduction.

deductions_general.name: CIT v. Indian Aluminium Co.
deductions_general.principle: Spousal travel for business deductible if business-related.

deductions_general.name: Eastern Investments Ltd. v. CIT
deductions_general.principle: Interest on borrowing for taxable income earning deductible.

deductions_general.name: Madras Auto Service v. CIT
deductions_general.principle: Lessee improvements to leased premises = revenue if for facilitating operations.

deductions_general.name: Checkmate Services v. CIT
deductions_general.principle: Employee PF/ESI contribution must be paid by PF/ESI Act due date, not Sec 43B return-filing date.

transfer_and_chargeability.name: CIT v. R.M. Amin
transfer_and_chargeability.principle: Liquidation distribution = transfer; cost adjusted by accumulated profits taxed as dividend.

transfer_and_chargeability.name: Suraj Lamps & Industries v. State of Haryana
transfer_and_chargeability.principle: PoA + unregistered sale agreement does NOT confer ownership.

transfer_and_chargeability.name: CIT v. Balbir Singh Maini
transfer_and_chargeability.principle: JDA without consideration / possession = no capital gains in agreement year.

cost_of_acquisition.name: CIT v. B.C. Srinivasa Setty
cost_of_acquisition.principle: If COA cannot be conceived, no capital gains.
cost_of_acquisition.overruled_by: Sec 90(3)(c) deems COA as NIL for self-generated intangibles

cost_of_acquisition.name: CIT v. Manjula J. Shah
cost_of_acquisition.principle: Inherited asset: indexation from previous owner's holding year.

exemption_54_series.name: Sanjeev Lal v. CIT
exemption_54_series.principle: Date of agreement to purchase counts as investment date.

exemption_54_series.name: CIT v. T.N. Aravinda Reddy
exemption_54_series.principle: Purchase from co-owner / brother qualifies for Sec 54 exemption.

exemption_54_series.name: CIT v. Smt. Tilak Raj Bedi
exemption_54_series.principle: Investment in spouse's name allowed where assessee provides funds.

exemption_54_series.name: CIT v. Gita Duggal
exemption_54_series.principle: 'A residential house' includes multiple units in same building.

exemption_54_series.name: Smt. Kalpana Hansraj v. ITO
exemption_54_series.principle: Substantial completion sufficient; no need for possession/registration.

stamp_duty_value.name: CIT v. Chandni Bhuchar
stamp_duty_value.principle: Assessee can challenge SDV; VO reference mandatory.

stamp_duty_value.name: CIT v. Smt. Nilofer I. Singh
stamp_duty_value.principle: Sec 50C does NOT apply to stock-in-trade.

esops.name: Mohanjit Singh v. ITO
esops.principle: ESOP capital gains COA = FMV on grant date (perquisite-tax FMV).

other_sources.name: CIT v. G.R. Karthikeyan
other_sources.principle: Race horse winnings, lotteries — wide scope.

other_sources.name: CIT v. Walfort Share & Stock Brokers
other_sources.principle: Pre-94(7) dividend stripping loss not disallowable merely for dividend receipt.

other_sources.name: ITO v. M.K. Mathivathanan
other_sources.principle: Gift through banking channel from NR relative — exempt under relative carve-out.

deductions.name: CIT v. Liberty India
deductions.principle: DEPB / duty drawback NOT 'derived from' eligible business.

deductions.name: DIT (Exemption) v. Bharat Diamond Bourse
deductions.principle: Charitable purpose test: profit motive doesn't disqualify if primary objective is public welfare.

loss_carry_forward.name: CIT v. Manmohan Das
loss_carry_forward.principle: Loss CF requires return for loss year.

loss_carry_forward.name: Hindustan Zinc Ltd. v. CIT
loss_carry_forward.principle: 51% shareholding continuity check at year-end of set-off vs loss year.

transfer_pricing.name: CIT v. Maruti Suzuki India
transfer_pricing.principle: AMP expenditure can be international transaction; Bright Line Test for non-routine.
transfer_pricing.note: BLT later rejected by Sony Ericsson

transfer_pricing.name: Sony Ericsson Mobile v. CIT
transfer_pricing.principle: BLT rejected. Each case on facts. Approved methods required.

transfer_pricing.name: Bharti Airtel v. ACIT
transfer_pricing.principle: Free of cost airtime from group company = international transaction.

transfer_pricing.name: GE Energy Parts Inc. v. CIT
transfer_pricing.principle: Marketing employees in India = DAPE; profit attribution required.

assessment_reassessment.name: CIT v. Kelvinator of India
assessment_reassessment.principle: Reassessment requires tangible material; mere change of opinion not permitted.

assessment_reassessment.name: Asst. CIT v. Rajesh Jhaveri Stock Brokers
assessment_reassessment.principle: 143(1) intimation NOT assessment for Sec 147 reopening.

assessment_reassessment.name: UOI v. Ashish Agarwal
assessment_reassessment.principle: Old Sec 148 notices post 1.4.2021 deemed under new regime.

assessment_reassessment.name: ACIT v. Saurashtra Kutch Stock Exchange
T.S. Balaram v. Volkart Brothers
assessment_reassessment.principle: Mistake apparent = obvious; debatable points NOT rectifiable.

assessment_reassessment.name: GKN Driveshafts v. ITO
assessment_reassessment.principle: Reassessment due process: reasons + objections + speaking order.

assessment_reassessment.name: CIT v. Jet Airways
assessment_reassessment.principle: If no addition on reopening issue, AO cannot make addition on other issues.

assessment_reassessment.name: PCIT v. Maruti Suzuki India
assessment_reassessment.principle: Reassessment notice on amalgamating co (which ceased to exist) invalid.

appeals.name: Goetze (India) Ltd. v. CIT
appeals.principle: Appellate authority can entertain new claim not in return.

appeals.name: DCIT v. Mahindra & Mahindra
appeals.principle: Capital loan waiver = capital receipt, not income.

tds_tcs.name: GE India Technology Centre v. CIT
tds_tcs.principle: TDS u/s 195 only if payment chargeable in India.

tds_tcs.name: Hindustan Coca-Cola Beverages v. CIT
tds_tcs.principle: If recipient has paid tax, deductor not in default for disallowance purposes.

penalty_prosecution.name: CIT v. Reliance Petroproducts
penalty_prosecution.principle: Bona fide claim disclosed in return = no penalty.

penalty_prosecution.name: Hindustan Steel v. State of Orissa
penalty_prosecution.principle: Penalty discretionary; not for technical breaches without contumacious conduct.

penalty_prosecution.name: MAK Data v. CIT
penalty_prosecution.principle: Voluntary disclosure during assessment doesn't auto-save from penalty.

penalty_prosecution.name: Sundaram Finance v. ACIT
penalty_prosecution.principle: Penalty notice must specify ground; ambiguous notice invalid.

refunds.name: CIT v. Gujarat Fluoro Chemicals
refunds.principle: Interest on interest on refund NOT payable absent statute.

ai_app_usage.retrieval_strategy: When user asks about a topic, retrieve cases tagged to relevant section + topic_tags. Sort by reliance: high → medium → low.
ai_app_usage.citation_template: [Case Name] ([Citation]) [Court] [Year] held: [Principle]. This applies to Section [section_2025] of the Income-tax Act, 2025 (corresponding to old Section [section_1961] of the 1961 Act).
ai_app_usage.disclaimer_required: Always end with: 'Verify current case status before reliance. Consult a CA before final filing.'
ai_app_usage.overruled_handling: If overruled=true, state '[Case] was earlier the position; HOWEVER, this has been overruled / superseded by [overruled_by]. Current position: [current rule].'

reliance_levels.high: Settled SC law / unequivocal HC + ITAT alignment — quote with confidence
reliance_levels.medium: HC law with possible contrary views — present and disclaim
reliance_levels.low: Distinguished / overruled / fact-specific — cite cautiously, prefer current statute

next_steps_for_app_team: Add 200-300 more cases across sub-topics as user questions arise (build feedback loop)
Subscribe to Manupatra / SCC Online for full-text case retrieval
Build monthly case-law update pipeline from CBDT / e-Courts feeds
Have a CA / Tax lawyer review the curated list annually
For sensitive areas (penalty, search, prosecution), require human (CA) review — do not rely solely on AI
